title: please    provide support for scoop  download

comments.body: Managed to fix this by installing the scoop-bridge-py package which handles Python package integration with scoop better. Just ran `pip install scoop-bridge-py` and it resolved the manifest verification issues I was seeing.

body:
when  I  use  scoop  install httpie  on powershell7
